role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific species (Horse Chestnut, Privet) and their landscaping context.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (curbs, width) and architectural codes.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized architectural details (shutters, stucco) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified France. The agents provided consistent, image-grounded evidence (architecture, botany) that favored France over neighbors. The meta agent's focus on specific architectural details (volets, stucco) was the strongest differentiator.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of trees and hedges match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Road and curb descriptions match image.
